roster_delta.desc: New York Yankees optioned C J.C. Escarra to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Jake Bird to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
Houston Astros traded RHP Jayden Murray to Chicago Cubs for 1B Cameron Sisneros.
Toronto Blue Jays activated CF Daulton Varsho from the 10-day injured list.
Toronto Blue Jays activated RHP Lazaro Estrada from the 60-day injured list.
Toronto Blue Jays optioned 2B Charles McAdoo to Buffalo Bisons.
Arizona Diamondbacks traded SS Luis Urías to Toronto Blue Jays for cash.
Toronto Blue Jays optioned LHP Brendon Little to Buffalo Bisons.
Chicago Cubs designated LHP Luis Peralta for assignment.
Houston Astros traded RHP Jayden Murray to Chicago Cubs for 1B Cameron Sisneros.
Los Angeles Dodgers placed RHP Blake Treinen on the 15-day injured list. Right elbow inflammation.
Los Angeles Dodgers recalled RHP Chayce McDermott from Oklahoma City Comets.
Arizona Diamondbacks placed LF Jordan Lawlar on the 10-day injured list. Right hamstring strain.
Arizona Diamondbacks placed RHP Michael Soroka on the 15-day injured list. Left glute strain.
Arizona Diamondbacks recalled LF Tim Tawa from Reno Aces.
Arizona Diamondbacks recalled LHP Philip Abner from Reno Aces.
Arizona Diamondbacks traded SS Luis Urías to Toronto Blue Jays for cash.
Boston Red Sox placed 2B Isiah Kiner-Falefa on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 19, 2026. Left forearm inflammation.
Boston Red Sox recalled 2B Anthony Seigler from Worcester Red Sox.
Baltimore Orioles placed C Adley Rutschman on the 7-day injured list retroactive to June 19, 2026. Concussion.
Baltimore Orioles recalled CF Michael Siani from Norfolk Tides.
San Diego Padres activated RHP Ron Marinaccio.
